mapper.select: select count(1) as 'create_count' from auto_case_roi acr where acr.is_deleted=0 and acr.create_time between UNIX_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}) * 1000 and UNIX_TIMESTAMP(concat(#{endTime},' 23:59:59')) * 1000

select count(1) as `rangeTimeExecCount`, count(if(aer.execution_status = 1, 1, null)) as `success_count`, count(if(aer.execution_status = 2, 1, null)) as `failure_count`, count(if(aer.execution_status = -1, 1, null)) as `other_error_count`, date_format(FROM_UNIXTIME(aer.execution_time/1000),'%Y-%m-%d') as `exec_time_day` from auto_execution_record aer left join auto_case_roi acr on acr.scenario_id = aer.scenario_id where aer.execution_time between UNIX_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}) * 1000 and UNIX_TIMESTAMP(concat(#{endTime},' 23:59:59')) * 1000 and aer.is_deleted=0 and acr.is_deleted = 0
group by date_format(FROM_UNIXTIME( aer.execution_time / 1000 ),'%Y-%m-%d') ;

select acr.*, count(1) as `range_time_exec_count`, count(if(aer.execution_status =1,1,null)) as `success_count`, count(if(aer.execution_status !=1,1,null)) as `failure_count`, date_format(FROM_UNIXTIME(aer.execution_time/1000),'%Y-%m-%d') as `exec_time_day` from auto_case_roi acr left join auto_execution_record aer on acr.scenario_id = aer.scenario_id where aer.execution_time between UNIX_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}) * 1000 and UNIX_TIMESTAMP(concat(#{endTime},' 23:59:59')) * 1000 and acr.is_deleted = 0 and aer.is_deleted=0
group by acr.scenario_id ;
